semantic.role: Infrastructure configuration loader and facade for the ArchSpine system, responsible for reading configuration from disk, parsing JSON, validating, and merging with defaults.
responsibilities: Merges a user-provided overrides object with default configuration using a shallow/moderately deep merge (handles nested object merging but stops at arrays).
Loads configuration from a file path: checks existence, reads file content, parses JSON, validates payload structure, and merges with defaults.
Uses a runtime IO interface to emit human-readable warnings for configuration parse errors or structural issues.
Provides a stable public surface (loadConfigData) for other modules to obtain a fully resolved SpineConfig.
outOfScope: Configuration file watch or hot-reload; this is a one-time synchronous load.
Advanced configuration transformations like environment variable interpolation.
invariants: Infra modules must expose stable low-level capabilities and facades; this file does so by exporting loadConfigData as a public configuration loading facade.
The function mergeConfigWithDefaults must not be directly used from higher-level orchestration layers if loadConfigData is the intended facade.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Centralized configuration loading and validation as a stable infra facade, keeping the rest of the system agnostic to file format and validation logic.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: v1.0.0 release — architectural governance and semantic layer for AI era; configuration loader likely established or refined to support the new governance system.

publicSurface: mergeConfigWithDefaults(defaults: Record<string, unknown>, overrides: unknown): Record<string, unknown>

English.role: Infrastructure configuration loader and facade for the ArchSpine system, responsible for reading configuration from disk, parsing JSON, validating, and merging with defaults.
responsibilities: Merges a user-provided overrides object with default configuration using a shallow/moderately deep merge (handles nested object merging but stops at arrays).
Loads configuration from a file path: checks existence, reads file content, parses JSON, validates payload structure, and merges with defaults.
Uses a runtime IO interface to emit human-readable warnings for configuration parse errors or structural issues.
Provides a stable public surface (loadConfigData) for other modules to obtain a fully resolved SpineConfig.
outOfScope: Configuration file watch or hot-reload; this is a one-time synchronous load.
Advanced configuration transformations like environment variable interpolation.

Simplified Chinese.role: ArchSpine 系统的基础设施配置加载器与外观模块，负责从磁盘读取配置、解析 JSON、校验结构，并与默认配置合并。
responsibilities: 将用户提供的覆盖对象与默认配置进行浅/适度深度合并（处理嵌套对象合并，数组则直接覆盖）。
从文件路径加载配置：检查文件存在性、读取文件内容、解析 JSON、校验载荷结构，并与默认值合并。
利用运行时 IO 接口输出人类可读的警告信息，提示配置解析错误或结构问题。
提供稳定的公开接口（loadConfigData），供其他模块获取完整解析后的 SpineConfig 对象。
outOfScope: 配置文件监听或热重载；本模块仅为一次性同步加载。
高级配置转换，例如环境变量插值。
身份验证、授权或网络请求。

exports.name: mergeConfigWithDefaults
exports.signature:
mergeConfigWithDefaults(
  defaults: Record<string, unknown>,
  overrides: unknown,
)
